_comment: Tipografía del Concepto 'Swiss Data Grid'. Fuentes vía Fontsource (self-hosted, importadas en Base.astro). Escala modular ratio 1.333, base 16px.

families.sans: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
families.serif: 'Source Serif 4 Variable', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif
families.mono: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
